---
title: "testing-cultural-tightness-across-fd-nonfd-hazards"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)

ds_FA <- read_csv("sharing-dataset-for-analysis.csv")

tl <- read_csv("../minerva/Tight-Loose/Datasets/DT-TL-FinalData.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    OWC = str_trim(OWC, side = c("both"))
  )

ds <- full_join(ds_FA, tl, by = c("OWC"))

hz_cat <- read_csv("../minerva/Hazards/Datasets/DT-hzcats-society-level.csv") %>%
  select(ID, allhazards_est_count_30)

ds <- full_join(ds, hz_cat, by = c("ID")) %>%
  mutate(
    General_TL5B_pref_final_bin = ordered(General_TL5B_pref_final,
      levels = c(1, 1.5, 1.75, 2, 2.25, 2.5, 2.75, 3, 3.25, 3.5, 3.75, 4))
  )

```



```{r}
tl_bp_clean <- ds %>%
  mutate(
    tl_bin = factor(if_else(General_TL5B_pref_final > 2.5, 1, 0)),
    normative_ind_IA = if_else(normative_est_count_30_IA > 0, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(General_TL5B_pref_final, allhazards_est_count_30, normative_ind_IA) %>%
  mutate(
    z_tl  = as.numeric(scale(General_TL5B_pref_final)),
    z_haz = as.numeric(scale(allhazards_est_count_30))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    abs(z_tl) <= 2,
    abs(z_haz) <= 2
  )

ggplot(tl_bp_clean, aes(
  x = allhazards_est_count_30,
  y = General_TL5B_pref_final,
  color = factor(normative_ind_IA)
)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0.1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "All Hazard Count (IA)",
    y = "Cultural tightness",
    color = "Normative Present",
    title = "Tight-Loose vs Hazard Count by Normative Hazard Presence"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



ggplot(ds, aes(x = fd_freq_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")

ggplot(ds, aes(x = fd_freq_30, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")




```




```{r}
tl_int <- ds %>%
  mutate(
    normative_ind_IA = if_else(normative_est_count_30_IA > 0, 1, 0),
    normative_ind_IA = factor(normative_ind_IA),
    TL_ord = ordered(General_TL5B_pref_final)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(TL_ord, allhazards_est_count_30_IA, normative_ind_IA) %>%
  mutate(
    allhazards_z = as.numeric(scale(allhazards_est_count_30_IA))
  )

mod_tl_allhaz_norm <- brm(
  formula = TL_ord ~ allhazards_z * normative_ind_IA + mo(ea033),
  data = tl_int,
  family = cumulative("logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"),
    prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "Intercept")
  ),
  seed = 123
)

summary(mod_tl_allhaz_norm)

conditional_effects(
  mod_tl_allhaz_norm,
  effects = "allhazards_z:normative_ind_IA"
)

hypothesis(mod_tl_allhaz_norm, "allhazards_z < 0")
hypothesis(mod_tl_allhaz_norm, "allhazards_z + allhazards_z:normative_ind_IA1 > 0")
hypothesis(mod_tl_allhaz_norm, "allhazards_z:normative_ind_IA1 > 0")
```

```{r}
draws_int <- as_draws_df(mod_tl_allhaz_norm)

x_vals <- draws_int$`b_allhazards_z:normative_ind_IA1`
x_lim <- max(abs(x_vals), na.rm = TRUE)

post_prob <- mean(x_vals > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
post_prob_label <- paste0("P(\u03b2 > 0) = ", round(post_prob * 100, 1), "%")

p_int <- draws_int %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `b_allhazards_z:normative_ind_IA1`)) +
  geom_density(fill = "#ED7D31", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_lim * 0.95,
    y = Inf,
    label = post_prob_label,
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior Distribution of Interaction Effect",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(All hazards" %*% "Normative hazards)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_int
```




# Food destroying
```{r}
fd_tl <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final_bin")]), ]
fd_tl_cont <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final_bin", "ea033")]), ]
```

```{r}
ggplot(fd_tl, aes(x = disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")

# sensitivity analysis
fd_tl$z_sev <- scale(fd_tl$disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)

fd_tl_trim <- fd_tl[abs(fd_tl$z_sev) <= 2, ]


ggplot(fd_tl_trim, aes(x = disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")
```

```{r}
mod_fd_tl <- brm(
  formula = General_TL5B_pref_final_bin ~ disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA,
  data = fd_tl,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95),
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)

mod_fd_tl_cont <- brm(
  formula = General_TL5B_pref_final_bin ~ disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA + mo(ea033),
  data = fd_tl_cont,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95),
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)

summary(mod_fd_tl)
summary(mod_fd_tl_cont)
```

```{r}
# plot(mod_fd_tl, type = "coef")

c_effects_plot <- conditional_effects(mod_fd_tl, categorical = TRUE)
c_effects_plot
```

```{r}
hypothesis(mod_fd_tl, "disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA < 0") # they do!

drawsfd <- as_draws_df(mod_fd_tl)

x_vals <- drawsfd$b_disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA
x_lim <- max(abs(x_vals), na.rm = TRUE)

post_prob <- mean(x_vals < 0, na.rm = TRUE)

pfd_tl <- drawsfd %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "#ED7D31", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_lim * 0.95,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("Post. Prob = ", round(post_prob * 100, 1), "%"),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    # title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Food destroying hazards weighted by severity)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

pfd_tl
```




```{r}
hypothesis(mod_fd_tl, "disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA < 0") # they do!

drawsfd_cont <- as_draws_df(mod_fd_tl_cont)

x_vals <- drawsfd_cont$b_disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA
x_lim <- max(abs(x_vals), na.rm = TRUE)

post_prob <- mean(x_vals < 0, na.rm = TRUE)

pfd_tl_cont <- drawsfd_cont %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "#ED7D31", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_lim * 0.95,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("Post. Prob = ", round(post_prob * 100, 1), "%"),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    # title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Food destroying hazards weighted by severity)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

pfd_tl_cont
```



# Severe non-food destroying frequency
```{r}
sevnfd_tl <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final_bin")]), ]

sevnfd_tl_cont <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final_bin", "ea033")]), ]
```

```{r}
ggplot(sevnfd_tl, aes(x = disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")

# sensitivity analysis
sevnfd_tl$z_sev <- scale(sevnfd_tl$disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA)

sevnfd_tl_trim <- sevnfd_tl[abs(sevnfd_tl$z_sev) <= 2, ]


ggplot(sevnfd_tl_trim, aes(x = disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")
```

```{r}
mod_sevnfd_tl <- brm(
  formula = General_TL5B_pref_final_bin ~ disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA,
  data = sevnfd_tl,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)

mod_sevnfd_tl_cont <- brm(
  formula = General_TL5B_pref_final_bin ~ disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA + mo(ea033),
  data = sevnfd_tl_cont,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)


summary(mod_sevnfd_tl)
summary(mod_sevnfd_tl)
```
```{r}
hypothesis(mod_sevnfd_tl, "disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA < 0")

draws_sevnfd <- as_draws_df(mod_sevnfd_tl)

x_vals <- draws_sevnfd$b_disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA
x_lim <- max(abs(x_vals), na.rm = TRUE)

post_prob <- mean(x_vals > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

pnfd_tl <- draws_sevnfd %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "#0070C0", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_lim * 0.95,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("Post. Prob = ", round(post_prob * 100, 1), "%"),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    # title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Non-food destroying hazards weighted by severity)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

pnfd_tl
```



```{r}
hypothesis(mod_sevnfd_tl_cont, "disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA > 0")

draws_sevnfd_cont <- as_draws_df(mod_sevnfd_tl_cont)

x_vals <- draws_sevnfd_cont$b_disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA
x_lim <- max(abs(x_vals), na.rm = TRUE)

post_prob <- mean(x_vals > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

pnfd_tl_cont <- draws_sevnfd_cont %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "#0070C0", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_lim * 0.95,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("Post. Prob = ", round(post_prob * 100, 1), "%"),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    # title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Non-food destroying hazards weighted by severity)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

pnfd_tl_cont
```
